meta.incident: A long-running transaction holds locks on shop.orders, causing lock-wait timeouts and deadlocks; connections pile up until max_connections is exceeded and new connections are refused — amid a recurring unresolved-IP-address warning distractor.

evidence.text: 2026-05-04T14:00:08.140000Z 41 [Warning] [MY-010055] [Server] IP address '<ip>' could not be resolved
2026-05-04T14:00:11.402000Z 77 [Warning] [MY-012324] [InnoDB] Trx id counter lag; long-running transaction trx_id=80551 active 42s holding locks on shop.orders
2026-05-04T14:00:14.665000Z 78 [ERROR] [MY-012345] [InnoDB] Lock wait timeout exceeded; try restarting transaction on table shop.orders
2026-05-04T14:00:17.930000Z 79 [ERROR] [MY-012345] [InnoDB] Lock wait timeout exceeded; try restarting transaction on table shop.orders
2026-05-04T14:00:20.193000Z 80 [ERROR] [MY-013183] [InnoDB] Deadlock found when trying to get lock; try restarting transaction
2026-05-04T14:00:22.718000Z 12 [Warning] [MY-010055] [Server] IP address '<ip>' could not be resolved
2026-05-04T14:00:25.980000Z 0 [Warning] [MY-010914] [Server] Too many connections: 152 of 151 max_connections reached, refusing new connections
2026-05-04T14:00:31.500000Z 81 [ERROR] [MY-013183] [InnoDB] Deadlock found when trying to get lock; try restarting transaction

top_templates.pattern: <*> [Warning] [MY-010055] [Server] IP address '<ip>' could not be resolved
<*> [Note] [MY-010914] [Server] Aborted connection <*> to db: 'shop' user: 'app' (Got timeout reading communication packets)
<*> [ERROR] [MY-012345] [InnoDB] Lock wait timeout exceeded; try restarting transaction on table shop.orders
<*> [ERROR] [MY-013183] [InnoDB] Deadlock found when trying to get lock; try restarting transaction
